title: センター！センター！センター！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon wins her first race and fulfills her
ambition to take center stage in a winning
concert.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's experienced the joy of standing
center stage...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her desire to become a top Umadol grows even
stronger.
